meta.metric: MCI prevalence — regional meta-analysis baseline + national overrides
meta.note: Regional baseline: Bai et al. 2022 (Age & Ageing) pooled MCI by World Bank region (adults 50+, community-dwelling). A few countries use a national study instead (kind=national). MCI criteria/age bands vary → modelled estimate, indicative only.
meta.regionalSrc: Bai et al. 2022, Age & Ageing (WB-region meta-analysis, 50+)
